name: ChatDesk
tagline: Real-time customer support without the enterprise price tag
metaDescription: ChatDesk replaces Intercom with live chat, automated routing, canned responses, and visitor tracking — all included in your AppBuster subscription.
heroSvg: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 100 100"><text x="50" y="70" text-anchor="middle" font-size="60">💬</text></svg>

features.title: Live Chat Widget
features.desc: Embed a fully customizable chat widget on any website. Match your brand colors, position, and greeting message to create a seamless visitor experience.

features.title: Automated Routing
features.desc: Route conversations to the right team member based on page URL, visitor segment, or topic keywords. Reduce first-response time by getting inquiries to the right person instantly.

features.title: Canned Responses
features.desc: Build a shared library of pre-written replies for common questions. Agents can insert responses with a single keystroke, keeping answers consistent across your team.

features.title: Visitor Tracking
features.desc: See which pages a visitor browsed before starting a chat, their location, device, and referral source. Context-rich conversations lead to faster resolutions.

features.title: Offline Messaging
features.desc: Capture messages when your team is away with a branded contact form. Conversations queue up and appear in the shared inbox the moment an agent comes online.

features.title: Performance Analytics
features.desc: Track response times, resolution rates, and customer satisfaction scores in real time. Identify bottlenecks and coach agents with data-driven insights.
